global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the main message and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple payment solution.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NovaPay' in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Secure & simple' in bold, white font against an orange background.

elements.label: Supporting message
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that reads 'Built for peace of mind', also in white font.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes in the background, including an oval and a rectangle, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A smaller circular shape in the background, complementing the larger shapes.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Install now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small circular shape that appears to be a decorative element, positioned near the bottom.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape that seems to be a decorative element, positioned towards the bottom right.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple Built for peace of mind' prominently displayed in white against an orange background.
elements.text_content: Secure simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in a bold, inviting style.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The logo 'NovaPay' displayed in a modern font at the top left corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, key elements include logo, main message, and call-to-action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
